title: Tiku Weds Sheru
overview: Tiku Weds Sheru is a romantic comedy about two quirky characters who dream of becoming film stars. While their romance blooms, they get caught between the chaos of the underworld and drugs, and face one tragedy after the other. Will their relationship survive the odds thrown at them?
